title: Releasio
description: A complete overhaul of all block textures and sounds for a more dynamic and immersive gameplay experience.
body:
This is a resource pack based on Kaze Emanuar's Super Mario 64 meme hack, [Super Releasio](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wYxMhCXyTkA).
It replaces every sound in the game with the BUP sound effect, and replaces _most_ block textures with Toad's face, similarly to the source material.

This pack will actively make the game more difficult to play. It's meant to be funny, not something you'd use seriously.

Also, because this pack changes block textures by replacing some of the parent models of blocks, it may or may not work with other resource packs that change models around.
